overall.description: A ship simulation game showing a first-person view from the bridge of a vessel navigating through stormy seas at night. The scene features working navigation monitors including a rotating radar, with a brief lightning strike illuminating the dark ocean waters.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship bridge navigating open ocean during storm

events.description: lightning strikes on the right side of the frame, briefly illuminating the storm clouds and ocean surface

agents.ego_description: piloting the ship through rough seas while monitoring the navigation radar and chart displays

entered.detail: circular radar display with rotating sweep arm showing navigation data
rectangular navigation chart display with colored depth indicators
rectangular sonar depth display showing underwater terrain
forward deck of the vessel with railings and deck plating visible through the bridge windows
dark choppy sea surface extending to the horizon
dark storm clouds covering the night sky

segments.scene_description: The view from a ship's bridge shows the vessel moving steadily through stormy nighttime waters. Three navigation monitors display radar, charts, and depth data at the top of the frame. The ship's bow cuts through the dark ocean as storm clouds fill the sky, interrupted briefly by a bright lightning flash on the right side.

[t=4s] radar_screen(center_near), chart_screen(left_near), depth_screen(right_near), ship_bow(center_mid), ocean_water(center_far), storm_clouds(center_far)

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a steady first-person perspective from a ship's bridge as it navigates through a volatile nighttime storm. It begins with the vessel cutting through dark, churning ocean waters, framed by the glow of three navigation monitors displaying radar, charts, and depth data. As the ship pushes forward under a heavy canopy of storm clouds, the oppressive darkness is suddenly interrupted by a bright flash of lightning on the right side of the frame. The scene then settles back into the deep shadows of the night, maintaining its forward momentum through the turbulent sea.
